title: Send first reply to Daniel Cho with 3 matched homes
evidence: Lead viewed 7 Beaverton homes and saved 3 searches (saved_searches), then asked about showing availability (activity_events). Matched 3 active Beaverton listings inside his $720k–$865k budget.

title: Generate MLS remarks for 7428 SW Maple Ave
evidence: Listing record has photos delivered and disclosures signed (listings, document_packets). Wrote 1,200-char MLS remarks from property facts: 4BR/3BA, 3,120 sqft, walk to Lake Oswego village, $895,000 target.

title: Flag inspection risk on 8912 SE Hawthorne Blvd
evidence: Email thread mentions a roof concern but no repair addendum exists in the loop (document_packets). Inspection contingency deadline is tomorrow (transactions.closeDate). Suggest drafting an inspection response addendum now.

title: Draft cash-offer outreach to Sarah Mitchell
evidence: Seller-intent score 91. Requested home value, opened the market report twice, and clicked the cash offer page (ownership_signals). High-equity Beaverton owner — propose a CMA + cash-offer comparison.

title: Send AI-built CMA to Melissa Grant
evidence: Re-activated past client opened the seller report (activity_events) and has owned the home 8 years, implying strong equity. Built a neighborhood CMA from RMLS comps; ready as a branded touch.

title: Schedule Spring Seller Nurture email blast
evidence: Audience = 1,286 likely sellers (seller_campaigns). Copy passed brand + compliance rules. Prior send hit 38.4% open rate; recommend Tuesday 9am window for best engagement.

title: Draft buyer agreement for Daniel Cho
evidence: Pre-approved buyer (contacts.preapproval) with budget $720k–$865k and Beaverton focus. Pre-filled OREF C-565 from the contact record; missing buyer initials on page 4 — agent to review before send.

title: Re-rank offers on 4218 SW Terwilliger Blvd
evidence: Compared 3 offers across price, financing, and close date (cash_offer_requests). Flagged the highest-price offer's financing contingency as weak; the cash offer nets within 1.2% and closes 14 days sooner.

title: Summarize overnight brokerage activity
evidence: Grouped 181 lead events into 22 priorities, drafted 14 replies, flagged 3 transactions at risk and 3 failed automations (activity_events, workflow_runs). No client-facing send performed.

title: Suggest mapping fix for CRM Sync failure

title: Auto-create coaching plan for Amanda Conlon
evidence: Pricing skill scored 62 and response time slipped to 14 min (agent KPIs). Converts to two CRM tasks: 'Run a pricing drill' and 'Call 2 active sellers today' assigned to Amanda.

title: Recommend budget shift from Zillow to Referral
evidence: Zillow ROI is 6,400% at $42k spend vs Referral at infinite ROI / $0 spend and Organic at 122,400% (sourceRoi). Suggest reallocating $15k from Zillow into referral incentives and SEO.
